title: Maa Beta
writer: Lekhraj Bhakri, Prem Dhawan, Rajaram Shastri
plot: Dependent on his elder brother, Bishan, Ganga and his wife, Rameshwari, are abused and asked to leave. They work hard, set up their own business, and soon become wealthy enough to even support Bishan and his wife. A pregnant Rames...
